summary.description: The event summary. Will be used as the alert summary if a new alert will be created.

details.description: The event details. Will be used as the alert details if a new alert will be created.

alertKey.description: Used to deduplicate events. If an open alert with the key already exists, the event will be appended to the alert's event log. Otherwise a new alert will be created. We will trim this value if necessary. Upper casing is allowed, however comparison is case insensitive.

severity.description: Optional severity in range 1..5. Will overwrite the evaluated severity of the alert source.

labels.description: Optional key/value labels that are attached to the alert.

services.description: Optional list of service refs. Usually pass alias; id is optional for rare edge cases.

routingKey.description: Optional routing key that overwrites the escalation policy of the alert source for ALERT events. Must map to routingKey of escalation policy
